name: Amon
description: ~!Amon is the Ancient Sun God's son, born with the Uniqueness of the Error pathway. "He" is one of the main antagonists of Lord of the Mysteries, as "He" is on the hunt for the mysterious space above the Gray Fog (Sefirah Castle) owned by Klein Moretti.!~

name: Ann Magnolia
description: Ann Magnolia is a character in the Violet Evergarden series and the protagonist of the second chapter of the first volume of the light novel. She is a young girl who lives with her terminally ill [mother](https://anilist.co/character/223026/Clara-Magnolia).

name: Ashley Oono
description: Ashley is a 32-year-old tax accountant who wears a red lolita style dress. She is reliable but very sadistic; she makes her clients reveal their fetishes through their expenses, but raises their tax return in exchange. ~!She is currently Itsuki's only acquaintance who knows Chihiro is a girl.!~

name: Ayane Satou
description: A ghost of a young woman who is said to appear when fireworks are fired during the summer. ~! At first everybody thought she committed suicide 3 years ago and then became a ghost. But Ayane later reveals to Tomoya that she didn't kill herself but was actually killed. Prior to her death she had a big fight with her mom and ran away from home. She got hit by a car and the driver, to erase all trace of the accident, packed her up in a suitcase and buried it underground where she eventually died. To

name: Azusa Shirasu
description: __Height:__ 149 cm __Academy:__ Trinity General School __Year:__ 2nd Year An ice queen who belongs to Trinity's Supplementary Lessons Department. Originally, she had dropped out of her school, but for one reason or another, she has returned to school and is working on her schoolwork again. She is lonely, but she voluntarily keeps her distance for fear of bothering others and is worried by the students in Supplementary Lessons Department.
mediaTitles: Blue Archive ~ New Summer Animation PV ~
searchTerms: Blue Archive ~ New Summer Animation PV ~

name: Baka Ki El Dogra
description: The first prince of the planet Dogura. He has an exceptionally high IQ and has little interest other than using it to torment those around him for his own amusement. His real name is Baka Ki El Dogra, but everybody refers to him solely as Prince or Prince Baka (a play with words since baka-ouji can mean both "Prince Baka" and "stupid prince"). He also appears for a few minutes in episode 36 of Hunter x Hunter (2011), commenting on an arena match. His voice actor was unlisted, however.

name: Beta
description: Captain of Protocol Omega 2.0.

name: Cioccolata
description: Cioccolata is a man of average build, having short hair save for mushroom shaped hairlocks on the top of his head. He also bears marks on his forehead and cheeks, and wears earrings, as well as a dark neckband. Cioccolata wears a stylized bright longcoat, in which a cross shaped lace partially reveals his chest and sporting multiple T-shaped holes on the arms. Under the same bright trousers, Cioccolata wears a dark thong. (Source: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia)
mediaTitles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind
searchTerms: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 5: Golden Wind

name: Duanmu Xi
description: Duanmu Xi is a powerful exorcist from an exorcist family. He has short white hair and silver-grey eyes that were changed to brown eyes in the donghua. He is a formal and calm when around others, and does not involve himself with small affairs, however when he is alone or around Yang Jinghua, he will show a softer, more gentle side of himself.

name: Farangis
description: Aloof, defiant, strong, and cool; Pharangese is both a dedicated cleric to the goddess Misra, and the most-skilled female fighter on the planet. She maintains her mystique throughout the course of the story, so that little is known of her personally. According to her own account, she was the most beautiful, intelligent and capable member of her order; when a prediction was made that a servant of Misra must protect Prince Arislan, the other clerics selected her to go, out of jealousy. (Source: Wi
mediaTitles: The Heroic Legend of Arslan: Dust Storm Dance
searchTerms: The Heroic Legend of Arslan: Dust Storm Dance

name: Flio
description: A kind-hearted young man who loves peace. He is suddenly summoned to another world as a "candidate for hero." He is banished because his abilities at level 1 were mediocre, but when he reaches level 2, his status changes to "∞." He obtains powers that ordinary people cannot handle.
mediaTitles: Chillin' in Another World with Level 2 Super Cheat Powers

Chillin’ in Another World with Level 2 Super Cheat Powers

name: Fumino Toyama
description: Fumino is Mitsumi's childhood friend. She remains in Ishikawa while Mitski attends high school in Tokyo. Despite the distance, the two remain best friends, frequently catching up over video calls, and confiding in each other.

name: Haruka
description: __Height:__ 171 cm The main protagonist of the story. Haruka, a bonfide loner, as well as his classmates were all surrounded by a magic circle. To avoid the world transfer, he escaped out of the classroom, but failed. This resulted in his transfer getting delayed and because of this, the skills that he could choose on a first-come, first-serve basis were only leftover skills. Failing to notice Haruka was missing, God decides to grant him all of the skills that were unchosen. One of the unchosen

name: Hideo Harada
description: __Level:__ Class A, 6. Dan __Group:__ Shiranami Karuta Society Hideo Harada is the head of the Shiranami Society for karuta that Chihaya and Taichi are part of. He used to teach Arata as well, while Arata was in primary school with Chihaya and Taichi. He taught Chihaya throughout Junior High School and is currently mentor to both Chihaya and Taichi. He is also a medical doctor and married. Harada Hideo is portrayed as a kind man with a deep and insightful knowledge of the game of karuta. He stat

name: Isao Shinomiya
description: __Height:__ 190 cm Isao Shinomiya is the Director General of the Defense Force and Kikoru Shinomiya's father. Isao is a very authoritative and serious man, being also very demanding towards both his subordinates and his daughter. As the Director General of the Defense Force and serving many years in its ranks, Isao is a far-sighted man who gives his orders firmly in sight of future threats. Isao is not above using living kaiju as weapons to empower the Defense Force. Despite is apparent cold and

name: Jackie
description: __Jackie__ is a bear beastman who lives the Slums, the poorest part of Anima City. She is a player on a baseball team called "Bears". She will eat absolutely anything and is terrible with money, constantly falling for scams or poor purchases . She is however, a cheerful and energetic individual, who is sure to have fun every day no matter the outcome.

name: James Moriarty
nativeName: ジェームズ・モリアーティ
searchTerms: ジェームズ・モリアーティ

name: Janemba
description: Result of all evil to have passed through hades, Janemba was formed due to a kid demon's neglect to watch the evil cleansing machine. At first, Janemba was a playful, extremely large and yellow spirit like demon. After being defeated by Goku as Super Saiyan 3, he transforms into a smaller, red demon, which neither Goku or Vegeta was able to beat.

name: Jennette Margarita
description: Jennette was the original protagonist of the book "The Lovely Princess" from the manhwa "Who Made Me a Princess", until the main protagonist of the series transmigrates into the body of Athanasia de Alger Obelia. She is a side character and views Athanasia with admiration. (Source: Who Made Me Princess Wikia)
mediaTitles: The Fated Magical Princess: Who Made Me a Princess
searchTerms: The Fated Magical Princess: Who Made Me a Princess

name: Kashiwada
description: Kashiwada does not show any facial expressions. She does, however, feel emotions. She is somewhat shy and blunt at the same time. She is not very secretive about her feelings, generally being very blunt when asked or when she feels it's necessary, but due to her expressionless face it can be hard to tell without context what she is feeling.
mediaTitles: 100-nichi Go ni Kao ni Deru Kashiwada
searchTerms: 100-nichi Go ni Kao ni Deru Kashiwada

name: Kuro Kagami
description: __Height:__ 139 cm Kuro is one of Rin's friends, and is secretly in love with her, although the only one who appears to be aware of her unrequited love is Mimi. She therefore sees Aoki as her love rival. Kuro is notable for her foul mouthed behaviour as well as physical aggression towards others. It is also implied that her family is fairly affluent compared to other students. Possibly as a result of this, Kuro is obsessed with following the latest and expensive fashion trends and likes to show

name: Kuroe Akaishi
description: **Hobbies:** Painting, Listening to Music The protagonist of the story, Kuroe has been suffering from a mysterious illness for at least sixteen years that causes abnormal body growth and disfigurement. This has led Kuroe to become an outcast feeling that nobody could accept someone like her. She has a pet dog named "Jumbo King".
